mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hapumdb_test.news (title, content, thumbnailSrc, open_status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{thumbnailSrc}, 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hapumdb_test.news WHERE open_status = 'Y' ORDER BY update_on DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hapumdb_test.news WHERE open_status='Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE hapumdb_test.news SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, thumbnailSrc = #{thumbnailSrc}, update_on = NOW(), open_status = #{openStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hapumdb_test.news ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20;
